localStatusReconciliation.scope: Repository-local T-507/T-508/T-509/T-514 facts only; external-source claims retain the 2026-07-12 cutoff.

classificationPolicy.verified: Direct local inspection or an authoritative primary source.
classificationPolicy.supported_inference: Strongly implied by verified evidence; decisive test remains.
classificationPolicy.hypothesis: Candidate mechanism awaiting a discriminating experiment.
classificationPolicy.blocked: Cannot lawfully or technically test with current authority or data.

foundryBoundary.existing: packages/reconstruction-foundry is the private review/sign/publish boundary

boundedSearch.limitation: A bounded negative search is not proof that a private or partner SDK does not exist.

xgridsRecovery.lawfulNextStep: request official sensor bundle, unencrypted calibration, SDK/export documentation, and written commercial independent-processing rights
xgridsRecovery.prohibitedNextStep: decode XBAG internals or bypass ZIP encryption
xgridsRecovery.historicalFallback: rights-approved open vendor exports aligned to independent E57, plus supplemental owned photography

trainerFindings.finding: T-514 completed a dependency-light CPU-only Config B checker and deterministic synthetic preflight: 74 tests passed and two fresh same-host receipts were byte-identical. The check has authority none, does not load or verify the training runtime, and execute plus the legacy runner remain fail-closed with exit 78.
wrapper imports pinned gsplat example then calls main() with no arguments; upstream main requires local_rank, world_rank, world_size and cfg
unsupported --config and --external_depth_dir flags; default rather than mcmc strategy; nested YAML not parsed
D-014 mandatory training bundle is not enforced; evaluation, resume and deterministic manifest paths are incomplete

externalSourceRetrieval.remainingGate: Retain a dated content snapshot or immutable commit/tag and content digest before a production legal decision.

keyConclusions.statement: A fully owned future-capture Foundry is feasible with bounded engineering and research.
Existing PortalCam full reconstruction is blocked without official raw payload, calibration and rights access; open-export salvage is feasible.
A multi-representation package is preferable to a monolithic splat or mesh.

Grand Hall has the strongest evidence-to-effort ratio under the bounded T-507 scope: decision B confirms anchors 000/010/020/040 and excludes adjacent 049, but does not classify all candidate sweeps 0-48.

unresolvedInventories.e57ArchivalFullSha256: not recorded in this evidence register; the diagnostic sample fingerprint is not an archival digest
unresolvedInventories.validE57PointTotal: not computed; 965,520,000 is the raw record total
unresolvedInventories.roomExportInventory: complete content-addressed inventories for Reception, Lady Convenor, North Gallery, and South Gallery exports are not recorded
unresolvedInventories.portalcamFirmwareAndSchemaVersions: firmware version and authoritative sidecar/schema versions are absent
unresolvedInventories.legacyMatterportAndUnrealAssets: legacy Matterport/crop/mesh inventory remains incomplete; the repository audit found zero Unreal artifacts
unresolvedInventories.colmapImageLineage: the 300 derived 1024x1024 JPEGs are distinct from the 4096x4096 E57 cubefaces, but their exact derivation/compression lineage is not proven
unresolvedInventories.colmapDuplicateEquivalence: candidate only; full-tree hash equivalence not recorded
unresolvedInventories.diagnosticTransformArtifact: T-507 saved deterministic fit and residual evidence, but the transform remains proposed/unreviewed with no independent control, typed reviewed TransformArtifact, or reviewer attestation
unresolvedInventories.portalcamPayloadLocation: supported inference only; payload placement inside xbin has not been decoded or verified
unresolvedInventories.publicRawSdkOrExport: not found in the bounded official-source search; vendor response still required
unresolvedInventories.purposeAwareRights: stage-specific validation is implemented, but the pilot has no trusted FoundryRightsApproval; global manifest approval remains all-purpose
unresolvedInventories.grandHallIdentityScope: decision B confirms only anchor sweeps 000/010/020/040 and excludes 049; full candidate-scope classification and external authenticated identity attestation remain open
unresolvedInventories.pilotJobSpec: no executable pilot JobSpec exists; T-507 supplies the bounded manifest digest, while full-scope classification, external identity attestation, stage purposes, worker digests, validated provider plan, trusted rights approval, short-lived execution confirmation, atomic confirmation consumption, and remote compute approval remain open
unresolvedInventories.confirmationReplayProtection: dispatch invokes consumeExecutionConfirmation only after all checks and denies false/throw; a truly atomic durable-store callback is not yet implemented
unresolvedInventories.qualityProfileRegistry: quality validation now requires an exact trusted profile/definition ID/digest catalogue match and package validation requires profileResolved; no durable approved profile-registry implementation exists

unresolved.nextTest: obtain a digest-bound external venue-authority attestation for decision B and classify every node/sweep in the intended 0-48 scope
acquire independent fit and blind controls, then review the frozen transform and residual evidence without rerunning T-507

T-514 completed the authority-none dependency-light contract preflight; repair and prove the real pinned v1.5.3 worker path including MCMC selection, external depth, distorted-camera policy, bilateral serialization, evaluation/resume and D-014 outputs before any approved D-016 smoke
rights-valid approved minimal RunPod training smoke
unresolved.cost: provider plan required; no approval granted
deterministic preparation and QA local; actual splat training only through approved D-016 RunPod execution
